response:
```sql
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM concert_date) AS concert_year
FROM concerts
GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM concert_date)
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(total_concerts)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_concerts
        FROM concerts
        GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM concert_date)
    ) AS yearly_concert_counts
);
```
